title: CDG-2
body: Candidate Dark Galaxy 2 (CDG-2) is a candidate for a dark galaxy, composed predominantly of dark matter, along with four globular clusters, in the Perseus cluster. It'd be one of the most dark matter dominated galaxies probably detected, estimated to be between 99.94% and 99.98% dark matter. It has been not confirmed yet if it's a true dark galaxy, more studies are required for a definitive conclusion.
